title: Sun in the Last Days of the Shogunate
writer: Hisashi Yamanouchi, Yûzô Kawashima, Shôhei Imamura
actors: Furankî Sakai, Sachiko Hidari, Yôko Minamida
plot: In the last days of the Shogunate, a resourceful grifter seeks to outwit competing prostitutes, rebellious samurai and other inhabitants of a brothel in order to survive the hardened times.
